sizing_rule.note: Position size scales inversely with stop-loss width relative to daily range. Tighter stops (< 1.0× daily range) require smaller position sizes. Risk multiplier of 0.7 applies when stop is tight. Maximum 7 concurrent positions.

source_rule_text: Position size must be inversely scaled to stop-loss width: tighter stops require proportionally smaller risk per trade to maintain consistent portfolio risk management.
